sprint: Creator V2 — Book Title / Page Number Off By Default
task: Direct follow-up to the @vihuplanet branding fix: the real project title and page number were still showing on every page by default, and product direction was to hide both reversibly. Traced to two hardcoded sources: js/themeEngine.js's _defaultOptionsFor()/renderer/slideRenderer.js's FALLBACK_OPTIONS (the computed base defaults), and the deeper real source, js/state.js's AppState.project.themeOptions, which pre-seeds every project with its own literal always-on values that getOptions() always lets win over the computed base -- fixing only the first source was silently shadowed. Flipped all three, each commented as an explicitly reversible default. handleVisibility stays 'show', unaffected. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
